sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁרביה

Transliteration: shêrêbyâh

Phonetic: shay-rayb-yaw'

BDB Definition:

Sherebiah = "Jehovah has scorched"
  1. a Levite who assisted Ezra at the reading of the Law and who sealed the covenant with Nehemiah

Origin: from H8273 and H3050

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
